description: You are a Database Consultant documenting a legacy SQLite database located at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Create a connection named 'Chinook' for this database. Export the full DDL (all CREATE TABLE statements) to /home/ga/Documents/exports/chinook_schema.sql. Generate a CSV file mapping foreign keys at /home/ga/Documents/exports/chinook_relationships.csv using the header: ChildTable,ChildColumn,ParentTable,ParentColumn. Additionally, create a summary CSV at /home/ga/Documents/exports/chinook_table_stats.csv with the header: TableName,RowCount,ColumnCount,PrimaryKeyColumns,ForeignKeyCount,IndexCount. Ensure all filenames and column headers match exactly.
